name: 250 MG Cycloserine Capsules IP
about: These 250 MG Cycloserine Capsules IP are a type of general medicine manufactured in India. Each box contains 10 strips, with each strip containing 10 capsules of 250 mg. The capsules are recommended to be stored in a dry and cool place and should be taken as per the doctors prescription.

faq.q: Can these capsules be taken without a doctors suggestion?
faq.a: It is advisable to always consult a doctor before consuming any medication.

faq.q: What is the recommended dosage of these capsules?
faq.a: The recommended dosage is 250 mg as per the doctors instructions.

faq.q: Where is the origin of these Cycloserine Capsules IP?
faq.a: These capsules are manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should these capsules be stored?
faq.a: It is recommended to store these capsules in a dry and cool place.

faq.q: Are these capsules available in different packaging sizes?
faq.a: These capsules come in a packaging of 10x1x10 capsules per box.
